sections.label: Verse 1
lines: En un, mawhna khempeuh a puakhia Pa,
Sihna Kalvary mual tungah,
Singlamteh tunggim na
sihna thuak in,
Kei a’ dingin a sisan hong luang

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Hong gum Topa pang pan
in-ah,
Sisan le tui hong luang khia hi;
Ka lung sungah om tawntung hik,
Mawhna kisawp siang
zo.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Mawhna sawpsiang na’ng tui a hong luangzo hi,
Hong Gum Topa sih na mun
pan;
A tawntungin tua tui ah kisil in,
Hong Gum Topa kiang zuan in pai ni

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Tua si
sungah a kisil khempeuh te,
A mawhna teng vuk bang ngo ding;
Na mawhna khempeuh uh hong maisak
ding;
Ka kiang hong pai un, Topa’n hong ci.

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Mawhna sungah ka paikik nawnkei
ding,
Jesuh’n kei hong suak ta sak ding;
A Kha Siangtho in kei hong pi ding a,
A
gamsung ah hong lutpih ding hi.
